title: Mixing Bowl Set, Dveda 5 Pcs Stainless Steel Nesting Mixing Bowls Set, Salad Bowl with Lids for Kitchen Cooking Baking Supplies, Including 6 Pcs Measuring Spoons, 1 Pc Egg Whisk
features: 1.Durable Material: The mixing bowl is made of food-grade stainless steel, which is durable and has the functions of corrosion resistance, drop resistance and rust resistance. They feature a mirror finish inside and brushed outside, which is attractive as well as functional.

2.Space Saving And Easy To Clean: 5 bowls of different sizes can be stacked for easy storage and carrying. The space-saving stackable design can bring convenience to our work in the kitchen. We can easily clean these bowls with water and soap or in the dishwasher. Note that the sealed lid can only be washed by hand, because using a dishwasher will deform the lid. The bowls are safe in the refrigerator, freezer and preheated oven.

3.Additional Features: The flexible plastic lid fits tightly to the bowl, keeping food fresh and preventing other things from falling in. Therefore, the mixing bowl can also be used to store dry food or other objects, and is an excellent choice for storing food . Comes with spoons and whisk to meet your mixing needs.

4.Mixing Bowl Set: There are 5 stainless steel mixing bowls with five colorful plastic covers, six rainbow spoons and a whisk. Fashionable and durable, it also brings a lot of convenience to your kitchen cooking and it's also a great gift for mother and wife.
5.100% Satisfaction After-sale Service: If you are not satisfied with your purchase for any reason, please feel free to reach our friendly customer support.
